item.title: The Book Which Tells The Truth
item.description: The first book by Raël, the written testimony of his first several encounters with Yahweh. 📖 Rael I — The Book Which Tells The Truth

item.title: Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet
item.description: The second book by Raël, also a written testimony of another encounter with Yahweh where he was taken to another planet. 📖 Rael II — Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet

item.title: L'Ère du Verseau: la Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste
item.description: A non-fiction book about the Aquarian Age and how that relates to the possibility of the biblical creation myth being extraterrestrial in nature. 📖 L’Ère du Verseau, la Fin de l’Illusion Humaniste

item.title: Escaping from Eden
item.description: The familiar stories of the book of Genesis affirm that God made the universe, planet earth, and you and me. However, various anomalies in the text clue us that we are not reading the original version of these stories. So what were the original narratives and what did they say about who we are and where we all came from? What was the earlier story of human origins, almost obliterated from the Hebrew Scriptures in the 6th century BC, and suppressed from Christian writing in the 2nd and 3rd centuries AD?

item.title: La Bibbia non è un libro sacro. Il grande inganno.
The Scars of Eden
item.description: THE SCARS OF EDEN will take you around the world to hear first hand from ancestral voices, alongside contemporary experiencers and world-renowned researchers. It will shine a light on revelations from the US Navy, The Pentagon, French and Israeli Intelligence will bring you right up to date in examining what has been forgotten and what has been remembered; what has been suppressed and what has been disclosed.

item.title: Echoes of Eden
item.description: Ancient stories from around the world describe entities which today we would call ETs. What other secrets lie hidden in the world’s ancestral narratives? From Senate briefings in Washington DC to secret ceremonies in southern Africa, from strange phenomena in Australia and Iraq to mysterious encounters in modern Brazil and ancient Greece, Echoes of Eden will take you around the globe to discover why Military, Intelligence and other government agencies are so interested in archeology, indigenous rituals and traditional initiation practices.
